methods.name: MCC-LO
methods.note: MCC-LO: scan-to-map point-to-plane with Maximum Correntropy Criterion (Welsch/Gaussian kernel) robust weighting and Silverman adaptive kernel bandwidth; CV prior, no GT seed. mean_weight=0.870 sigma=0.298

methods.name: I-LOAM
methods.note: I-LOAM (Park/Jang/Kim, UR 2020): intensity-enhanced LOAM odometry+mapping on KITTI PointXYZI; no GT seed. mean_intensity_weight=0.005362 mapping_updates=119

methods.name: InTEn-LOAM
methods.note: InTEn-LOAM (Li et al., RS 2022/23): cylindrical FEF + intensity registration + TVF/DOR/mapping; no GT seed. tvf=on dor=on mapping=on mapping_updates=59 mean_intensity_residual=1955.292651

methods.name: MCGICP-LO
methods.note: MCGICP-LO (Servos/Waslander, RAS 2017): 4D multi-channel GICP with intensity in point covariance + Mahalanobis correspondences; constant-velocity prior, no GT seed. mean_intensity_residual/scale=0.838 / scale=2.00

methods.name: ICPSC-LO
methods.note: ICPSC-LO (Zhang et al., JAG 2023): cylindrical intensity shape-context + adaptive geom/intensity fusion scan-to-map; loop closure deferred. no GT seed. mean_geom_weight=0.946
